zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Edmund Bedingfield於1400年出生在英國素福爾可丹納姆 聖 瑪麗時，他的父親Thomas Bedingfield26歲，母親Isabel Ogilvy of Auchterhouse, latterly of Bedingfield22歲。他於大約1427年與Margaret Tudenham Scott在英國英格蘭諾福爾可奧可波洛結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他去世於1451年7月1日在英國諾福爾可奧可波洛享年51歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭素福爾可貝汀菲兒。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Edmund Bedingfield于1400年出生在英国素福爾可丹納姆 聖 瑪麗时，他的父亲Thomas Bedingfield26岁，母亲Isabel Ogilvy of Auchterhouse, latterly of Bedingfield22岁。他于大约1427年与Margaret Tudenham Scott在英国英格兰諾福爾可奧可波洛结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和3个女儿的父母。他去世于1451年7月1日在英国諾福爾可奧可波洛享年51岁，埋葬在英国英格兰素福爾可貝汀菲兒。

nameMeanings.name: Bedingfield
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Suffolk and Norfolk): variant of   Beddingfield  .

variants.name: Beddingfield
meanings: English (Suffolk): habitational name from Bedingfield in Suffolk. The placename is recorded in Domesday Book as Bedingefelda, from the Old English personal name Bēda + the connective particle -ing- ‘associated with, named after’ + feld ‘open country’.

nameMeanings.name: Edmund
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old English personal name derived from ēad ‘prosperity, riches’ + mund ‘protector’. It was borne by several early royal and saintly figures, including a 9th-century king of East Anglia killed by invading Danes, allegedly for his adherence to Christianity. In the 16th and 17th centuries, there was a good deal of interchange between Edmund and Edward.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Edmund Bedingfield was born in 1400, in Denham St Mary, Suffolk, England, his father, Thomas Bedingfield, was 26 and his mother, Isabel Ogilvy of Auchterhouse, latterly of Bedingfield, was 22. He married Margaret Tudenham Scott about 1427, in Oxborough, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 3 daughters. He died on 1 July 1451, in Oxborough, Norfolk, England, at the age of 51, and was buried in Bedingfield, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Edmund Bedingfield est né en 1400, à Denham St Mary, Suffolk, Angleterre, son père, Thomas Bedingfield, avait 26 ans et sa mère, Isabel Ogilvy of Auchterhouse, latterly of Bedingfield, avait 22 ans. Il a épousé Margaret Tudenham Scott environ 1427, à Oxborough, Norfolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 3 filles. Il est décédé le 1 juillet 1451, à Oxborough, Norfolk, Angleterre, à l’âge de 51 ans, et a été enterré à Bedingfield, Suffolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Edmund Bedingfield 1400 in Denham St Mary, Suffolk, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Thomas Bedingfield 26 und seine Mutter Isabel Ogilvy of Auchterhouse, latterly of Bedingfield 22. Er hat um 1427 in Oxborough, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom Margaret Tudenham Scott geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Er starb am 1. Juli 1451 im Alter von 51 Jahren in Oxborough, Norfolk, England und wurde in Bedingfield, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Edmund Bedingfield è nato il nel 1400 nel Denham St Mary, Suffolk, England, il suo padre, Thomas Bedingfield, aveva 26 anni e il suo madre, Isabel Ogilvy of Auchterhouse, latterly of Bedingfield, aveva 22 anni. Lui sposato Margaret Tudenham Scott circa 1427, nel Oxborough, Norfolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 3 figlie. Morì il 1 luglio 1451, nel Oxborough, Norfolk, England, all'età di 51 anni, e fu sepolto a Bedingfield, Suffolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Edmund Bedingfieldが1400年にイギリススフォルクデンハム スト マリーで生まれた時，父Thomas Bedingfieldは26歳，母Isabel Ogilvy of Auchterhouse, latterly of Bedingfieldは22歳であった。約1427年にイギリスイギリスノーフォルクオクスボロウでMargaret Tudenham Scottと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼は1451年7月1日にイギリスノーフォルクオクスボロウで51歳で死去し，イギリスイギリススフォルクベディングフィールドにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Edmund Bedingfield(이)가 1400년 영국 수폴크 데함 스트 메리에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Thomas Bedingfield(은)는 26세였고, 그의 어머니 Isabel Ogilvy of Auchterhouse, latterly of Bedingfield(은)는 22세였다. 그는 대략 1427년 영국 잉글랜드 노르폴크 스버루그h에서 Margaret Tudenham Scott(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1451년 7월 1일 영국 노르폴크 스버루그h에서 51세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크 베딩필드에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Edmund Bedingfield nasceu em 1400, em Denham St Mary, Suffolk, Inglaterra, seu pai, Thomas Bedingfield, tinha 26 anos e sua mãe, Isabel Ogilvy of Auchterhouse, latterly of Bedingfield, tinha 22 anos. Ele casou-se com Margaret Tudenham Scott aproximadamente 1427, em Oxborough, Norfolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 3 filhas. Ele faleceu em 1 de julho de 1451, em Oxborough, Norfolk, Inglaterra, com 51 anos, e foi sepultado em Bedingfield, Suffolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Edmund Bedingfield родился в 1400 г. в местности денам ст мэри, суффолк, Англия, его отцу по имени Thomas Bedingfield было 26 лет, а матери, которую звали Isabel Ogilvy of Auchterhouse, latterly of Bedingfield, 22. Он женился на женщине по имени Margaret Tudenham Scott около 1427 г. в местности оксбороую, норфолк, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 3 дочери. Он умер 1 июля 1451 г. в местности оксбороую, норфолк, Англия в возрасте 51 год и был похоронен в местности бедингфиелд, суффолк, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir Edmund Bedingfield nació en 1400, en Denham St Mary, Suffolk, Inglaterra, su papá, Thomas Bedingfield, tenía 26 años y su mamá, Isabel Ogilvy of Auchterhouse, latterly of Bedingfield, tenía 22 años. Se casó con Margaret Tudenham Scott aproximadamente 1427, en Oxborough, Norfolk, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió el 1 de julio de 1451, en Oxborough, Norfolk, Inglaterra, a la edad de 51 años, y fue sepultado en Bedingfield, Suffolk, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
